title: BEM-868 missing needles
objective:
Run script:
"""
ctx = Path('governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md')
text = ctx.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if ctx.exists() else ''
needles = ['BEM-867 completed', 'BEM-868 | Dispatch channel recovered', 'APPROVED_WITH_NOTES', 'Next: continue roadmap from AGENT_CONTEXT.md']
outdir = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/bem868_missing_needles')
outdir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
for n in needles:
    code = 'PRESENT' if n in text else 'MISSING'
    safe = ''.join(ch if ch.isalnum() else '_' for ch in n)[:120]
    marker = outdir / (code + '_' + safe + '.md')
    marker.write_text('# BEM-868 context needle\nNeedle: ' + n + '\nStatus: ' + code + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(marker))
status = 'ALL_PRESENT' if all(n in text for n in needles) else 'SOME_MISSING'
summary = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM868_CONTEXT_MISSING_NEEDLES_' + status + '.md')
summary.write_text('# BEM-868 context missing needles\nStatus: ' + status + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(summary))
ops_applied.append('BEM868 context missing needles: ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
